post.name: flux-identity
post.content:
#!/bin/sh
# FluxBilling: identity from kernel cmdline (fluxhost= fluxpass=).
# Runs in the live env after install; target is mounted at /mnt.
C=$(cat /proc/cmdline)
zget() { echo "$C" | tr ' ' '\n' | sed -n "s/^$1=//p" | head -n1; }
H=$(zget fluxhost); [ -n "$H" ] || H=fluxserver
P=$(zget fluxpass); [ -n "$P" ] || P=fluxbilling
echo "$H" > /mnt/etc/hostname
chroot /mnt /bin/sh -c "echo root:$P | chpasswd"
chroot /mnt /bin/sh -c "id user >/dev/null 2>&1 || useradd -m -c 'Default User' user"
chroot /mnt /bin/sh -c "echo user:$P | chpasswd"
sed -i 's/^#\?PermitRootLogin.*/PermitRootLogin yes/' /mnt/etc/ssh/sshd_config
chroot /mnt systemctl enable sshd
